title: Yitshar #3324
definition:
Izhar = "shining oil"

 1) son of Kohath, grandson of Levi, uncle of Moses and Aaron, and
    father of Korah; progenitor of the Izharites
nasbUsage:
Definition: Izhar = "shining oil"

 1) son of Kohath, grandson of Levi, uncle of Moses and Aaron, and
    father of Korah; progenitor of the Izharites

    NASB:  a Levite
